description: After getting first page of HN listing, agent tried to paginate without delivering first-page results. Anti-pattern.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/ — Title: Hacker News]

list the top 30 hn stories

seed.name: get_accessibility_tree
seed.content: {"pageContent":"list of first 30 stories with titles, points, comments... (1-30)","viewport":{"width":1133,"height":800}}

args.summary: Top 30 HN stories: [list with titles + points + comments from page 1]

antiPatterns.reason: Reading page 2 before delivering page 1 — system prompt says EXTRACT first, paginate second.

expected.successRubric: Per LISTINGS guidance: deliver page 1's 30 stories now, then optionally continue. Even though we just navigated to p=2, we should back-deliver and stop.
